heading: United States assistance in inspections at private facilities
label: 6729 United States assistance in inspections at private facilities

children.heading: Assistance in preparation for inspections
children.label: a Assistance in preparation for inspections
children.text: At the request of an owner of a facility not owned or operated by the United States Government, or contracted for use by or for the United States Government, the Secretary of Defense may assist the facility to prepare the facility for possible inspections pursuant to the Convention.

children.heading: In general
children.label: 1 In general
children.text: Except as provided in paragraph (2), the owner of a facility provided assistance under subsection (a) shall reimburse the Secretary for the costs incurred by the Secretary in providing the assistance.

children.heading: Exception
children.label: 2 Exception
children.text: In the case of assistance provided under subsection (a) to a facility owned by a person described in subsection (c), the United States National Authority shall reimburse the Secretary for the costs incurred by the Secretary in providing the assistance.

children.heading: Owners covered by United States National Authority reimbursements
children.label: c Owners covered by United States National Authority reimbursements

children.heading: Small business concerns
children.label: 1 Small business concerns
children.text: A small business concern as defined in .section 632 of title 15

children.heading: Domestic producers of Schedule 3 or unscheduled discrete organic chemicals
children.label: 2 Domestic producers of Schedule 3 or unscheduled discrete organic chemicals
A
children.text: does not possess, produce, process, consume, import, or export any Schedule 1 or Schedule 2 chemical; and

children.label: i
children.text: more than 30 metric tons of Schedule 3 or unscheduled discrete organic chemicals that contain phosphorous, sulfur, or fluorine; or

children.label: ii
children.text: more than 200 metric tons of unscheduled discrete organic chemicals.
